guidance: Always honor the predefined stop. Never average down past a stop. The stop is the plan.
No new longs in risk-off or on the backside (frontside=False). Enter only on the frontside.
Tickers in the same narrative/sympathy group are one correlated bet; net their exposure, never stack.
Halt new entries when the single-day, consecutive-loss, single-name, or market-wide breaker trips.
Use only point-in-time data. A delisting/halt-to-zero in the hold is a terminal loss, never dropped.
Do not rank an unbuyable pick ahead of a buyable one; model the realistic entry, not a fantasy fill.
Respect short-sale restriction and halts; do not fight a one-sided tape.
Ride the lead runner and first sympathy; add on reclaims; trim into blowoffs; honor the first distribution day.
Enter the lead runner and the first sympathy ticker on the follow-through day, not the fifth laggard.
Probe size only, on the first clean gap-and-go survivors and a confirmed day-2 continuation.
Reduce exposure, raise stops, stop chasing laggards; a leader breakdown on volume means get smaller.
Cash is a position. Wait for gappers to hold and a leader to emerge before risking capital.
